experiences.title: Founder & CEO Spain
experiences.description:
TuMedio is one of the top Digital Out of Home (DOOH) advertising specialist of the Spain and Portugal with internacional reach across Europe and LATAM.

Founded in 2014 by a small team of industry experts, TuMedio is focused in proximity, local, regional and niche advertising campaigns in all kind of urban environments. 

With presence in all main geographical markets Madrid, Barcelona, Andalusia, we are the Spanish market leader in car park advertising with more than 300 car parks in Spain and over 400 outdoor & indoor digital billboards.

Since 2020 we have been pioneers in Programmatic DOOH and mobile + OOH campaigns in Iberia.

experiences.title: Co-Founder & Board Member
experiences.description: Disruptive Trends, Gaming & ESports and Multimedia specialists in Iberia and LATAM

experiences.title: Development & Institutional Director
experiences.description:
- Management of a multiskilled team of profesionals with responsibilities over long term strategy and its implementation.
- Management of a multiskilled team including functional areas such as legal, public and private tenders, and of regional managers across the the whole market.
- Manager and member of the board of Clear Channel - CEMUSA Joint Venture for the City of Madrid.
- Leadership over 200 key accounts with Public Administrations, Transport Authorities and Shopping Malls developers & managers.
- Responsability over the capex and development budget
- Member of several task forces and work groups within Clear Channel International's community

experiences.title: Patrimony Director
experiences.description:
- Management of more than 7000 advertising panels troughout Spain.
- Supervision of team of 35 people
- Design & implementation of the deparment's policy: budget, incentive packages,inner company relations, client relations (national accounts)

experiences.title: Deputy Director of the City Relations and Business Development
experiences.description:
Responsible for Business Development and contract management in Spain.

Permanent contacts with politicians and high level civil servants.

Search of project partners to participate in public tenders

education.field_of_study: Business,  Management,  Marketing,  and Related Support Services

accomplishment_projects.title: Mejora de mobiliario urbano en la ciudad de Ávila
accomplishment_projects.description: La Unidad de Diseño Institucional del Ayuntamiento de Ávila está colaborando con la empresa TuMedio en el proyecto de mejora de mobiliario urbano impulsado por el Ayuntamiento y que está tomando forma a través, por ejemplo, de marquesinas.

accomplishment_projects.title: Mupi Muestra de Teatro Ciudad de Ávila_2015
accomplishment_projects.description: Diseño de mupi para publicitar la Muestra de Teatro Ciudad de Ávila; actuación que se encuentra dentro del proyecto de mejora de mobiliario urbano impulsado por el Ayuntamiento de Ávila.

accomplishment_projects.title: MEJORA DEL MOBILIARIO URBANO DE LA CIUDAD DE ÁVILA
accomplishment_projects.description: La Unidad de Diseño Institucional del Ayuntamiento de Ávila está colaborando con la empresa TuMedio en el proyecto de mejora de mobiliario urbano impulsado por el Ayuntamiento y que está tomando forma a través, por ejemplo, del diseño de mupis.
